summary: Iteration 98: Split Commessa feature for mixed-normativa quotes - Full E2E testing complete. All 15 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend Split Dialog UI tested and working. Fixed a bug in analyze_preventivo_content() where None values in notes/description fields caused TypeError.
critical_code_review_comments: Split Commessa feature correctly implements EN 1090 (structures) vs EN 13241 (gates) conflict detection
Keywords for classification: EN 1090: tettoia, scala, soppalco, trave, struttura, pensilina, carpenteria, ringhier
Keywords for classification: EN 13241: cancell, portone, scorrevol, battente, chiusura, serranda, sezionale, barriera
Keywords for motorization: motore, motorizzat, bft, came, faac, nice, automazione, fotocellul
Split creates commesse with suffixed numbers (-A, -B) and correct normativa_tipo
EN 13241 commessa auto-creates gate_certification document as expected
Preventivo marked as 'accettato' with split_commesse metadata after split

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Split Dialog UI tested, all interactions working)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test preventivi with EN 1090, EN 13241, and mixed content. Split commesse created: NF-2026-000001-A (EN 1090), NF-2026-000001-B (EN 13241)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Split Commessa feature fully implemented and tested. Bug fixed in analyze_preventivo_content() for None values. Test user session available. Commesse with -A/-B suffixes exist for verification.

test_classes: TestAnalyzePreventivo (4 tests) - mixed conflict detection, single normativa no conflict, motorization detection, 404 for nonexistent
TestSingleCommessaCreation (2 tests) - create from structures, gates auto-creates gate cert
TestSplitCommessaCreation (3 tests) - split creates 2 commesse, requires 2 commesse min, rejects duplicate indices
TestKeywordClassification (2 tests) - EN 1090 and EN 13241 keywords
TestMotorizationDetection (1 test) - all motor keywords detected
TestEdgeCases (2 tests) - empty lines, nonexistent preventivo

tests_executed.results: PASS - Split Dialog UI working correctly
verified: Created mixed-normativa preventivo with tettoia (EN 1090) and cancello (EN 13241)
Clicked Commessa button - Split Dialog appeared with warning message
Dialog shows 2 groups: Commessa A (Strutture, EN 1090) and Commessa B (Cancelli, EN 13241)
Items correctly assigned to groups based on keywords
Clicked 'Crea 2 Commesse Separate' - navigated to commessa NF-2026-000001-A
Commessa timeline shows SPLIT_COMMESSA, NORMATIVA_RILEVATA events

features_verified: GET /api/commesse/analyze-preventivo/{preventivo_id} - Returns conflict detection with groups (en_1090, en_13241, non_classificati)
POST /api/commesse/from-preventivo/{preventivo_id} - Single commessa creation works correctly
POST /api/commesse/from-preventivo/{preventivo_id}/split - Creates 2 commesse with suffixed numbers and correct normativa
Frontend Split Dialog - Shows conflict warning, 2 groups with items, Confirm button
Preventivo marked as 'accettato' with split_commesse metadata after split

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError in analyze_preventivo_content when notes/description is None
bug_fixed.root_cause: Python dict.get('key', '') returns None if key exists with None value, not empty string
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use 'or' pattern: preventivo.get('notes') or '' to handle None values
